items.text:
🔍 *ENRICH REVIEW*  \[✨ ENRICHED\]

*Name:* Speke Hall
*Country:* england
*Region:* northern england
*County:* Merseyside
*Type:* castle
*Period:* 16th century
*Coords:* 53.3368, -2.87422
*Wikipedia:* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Speke_Hall
*Maps:* https://www.google.com/maps/search/Speke%20Hall/@53.35,-2.87,15z
*Main Image:* https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/place-photos/AJRVUZOvGbk9J56eVTZL7Y2lZeQ8NcymEBnz0Pg44BAPWMe_j90d4IPoZDg-Tc0r3uvVMKE982xKYxPUxlrzHuIysnzWcWfqx9WO0f1zNtmREfN8Y-lUBtPm9Bd-NT8pNbAFfM_IW3m7gIPsXclzJg=s4800-w1200
*Gallery:* 0 images
*Image Source:* google
*Has Wikipedia:* unknown
*Has Google Places:* unknown

*Description:*
Speke Hall is a wood-framed wattle-and-daub Tudor manor house in Speke, Liverpool, England. It is one of the finest surviving examples of its kind. It is owned by the National Trust and is a Grade I listed building.

_Listing 1 of 80_

imageAttribution.description: The most photographed view, from the front.

items.text:
🔍 *ENRICH REVIEW*  \[✨ ENRICHED\]

*Name:* Hever Castle
*Country:* england
*Region:* south east london
*County:* Kent
*Type:* castle
*Period:* 13th century
*Coords:* 51.18722222, 0.11416667
*Wikipedia:* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hever_Castle
*Maps:* https://www.google.com/maps/search/Hever%20Castle/@51.1843,0.1158,15z
*Main Image:* https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/place-photos/AJRVUZO0VJgI3uoDqCUhY9G4pjv0bcQ4wfpQWDgnniOz0ZxzzqoS25nZWizxD_YZVQr1jMxpZiuY2bwdy7N4WxQ5nXSz8RXLJ9jbVbhSq1jvZMGDB5bB-2RoQDmiXLIE_PAGST0k8zBm4BnMOSDTOg=s4800-w1200
*Gallery:* 0 images
*Image Source:* google
*Has Wikipedia:* unknown
*Has Google Places:* unknown
*Enrich Notes:* add source - https://www.hevercastle.co.uk/

*Description:*
Hever Castle is located in the village of Hever, Kent, near Edenbridge, 30 miles (48 km) south-east of London, England. It began as a country house, built in the 13th century. From 1462 to 1539, it was the seat of the Boleyn family.

_Listing 2 of 80_
